violations.description: Redundant navigation in beforeEach block. In 6 out of 9 tests, ownerPage navigates to '/reports' in the beforeEach block, only to immediately navigate to another page (e.g. '/reports/templates', '/reports/agent-log', '/analytics', etc.) at the start of the test.
violations.suggestion: Move route-specific navigations out of beforeEach and place them inside only the individual tests that require them, or group tests in nested describe blocks with separate beforeEach setups.

violations.description: The describe block does not configure explicit parallel execution within the file
violations.suggestion: Enable parallel E2E execution inside the test file using 'test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' })' to fully leverage Playwright's parallel runner.

recommendations: Refactor navigation: only navigate to '/reports' in tests that actually use it, avoiding double-navigation overhead.
Add 'test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' })' at the top of the describe block to run E2E tests concurrently.
summary: Performance is degraded by a major navigation inefficiency: a global beforeEach always navigates to '/reports', which is completely redundant for 6 out of the 9 tests that immediately navigate elsewhere. Fixing this will decrease E2E test execution time significantly.
